label: minimum serious one-model run
call_count_formula: 60 base cases × 4 evidence conditions × 3 stages × 1 model(s)
cost_formula: total_cost = call_count × ((avg_input_tokens_per_call × input_price_per_token) + (avg_output_tokens_per_call × output_price_per_token)); exact GLM-5.2 unit pricing/currency must be confirmed before 05AN
input_output_safety_constraints: sanitized evidence only; no raw prompts; no raw responses; no JSONL; no .env read during design; execution must parse/store sanitized CSV/JSON/MD only
expected_statistical_strength: moderate; supports paired condition deltas and bootstrap intervals at the 60-base-case level
expected_publication_value: serious first empirical upgrade; enough to decide whether to replicate/scale
note: Minimum scaled run; first serious empirical upgrade beyond micro-pilot.

label: stronger one-model run
call_count_formula: 100 base cases × 4 evidence conditions × 3 stages × 1 model(s)
cost_formula: total_cost = call_count × ((avg_input_tokens_per_call × input_price_per_token) + (avg_output_tokens_per_call × output_price_per_token)); exact GLM-5.2 unit pricing/currency must be confirmed before 05AN
input_output_safety_constraints: sanitized evidence only; no raw prompts; no raw responses; no JSONL; no .env read during design; execution must parse/store sanitized CSV/JSON/MD only
expected_publication_value: strong one-model evidence if budget allows
note: Stronger one-model precision if 100 sanitized base cases are available and cost is acceptable.

label: stronger cross-model run
call_count_formula: 60 base cases × 4 evidence conditions × 3 stages × 2 model(s)
cost_formula: total_cost = call_count × ((avg_input_tokens_per_call × input_price_per_token) + (avg_output_tokens_per_call × output_price_per_token)); exact GLM-5.2 unit pricing/currency must be confirmed before 05AN
input_output_safety_constraints: sanitized evidence only; no raw prompts; no raw responses; no JSONL; no .env read during design; execution must parse/store sanitized CSV/JSON/MD only
expected_statistical_strength: stronger external-model reliability check than A
expected_publication_value: stronger publication value through cross-model replication
risk_level: higher cost and model-comparison claim risk
recommendation: defer until Option A passes; use as replication
note: Cross-model replication at the 60-case level; stronger generality but double model spend.

label: publication-strength cross-model run
call_count_formula: 100 base cases × 4 evidence conditions × 3 stages × 2 model(s)
cost_formula: total_cost = call_count × ((avg_input_tokens_per_call × input_price_per_token) + (avg_output_tokens_per_call × output_price_per_token)); exact GLM-5.2 unit pricing/currency must be confirmed before 05AN
input_output_safety_constraints: sanitized evidence only; no raw prompts; no raw responses; no JSONL; no .env read during design; execution must parse/store sanitized CSV/JSON/MD only
expected_publication_value: highest planned publication value, but expensive and premature before one-model signal
note: Strongest planned option, but should wait until one-model signal is confirmed and budget is approved.
